        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-28"
    strings:

        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-33280 - Buffalo Wi-Fi Router OS Command Injection V"; content:"CVE-2026-33280"; nocase; sid:8142247; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-22742 - Server-Side Request Forgery in BedrockProxy"; content:"CVE-2026-22742"; nocase; sid:3707023; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-22744 - Spring AI Redis Store Unescaped User-Contro"; content:"CVE-2026-22744"; nocase; sid:2366739; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
